stemHtml: Can Noise Abatement Departure Procedures (NADP) be disregarded?

options.a: The PIC can disregard the NADP if it is for the safety of the flight.
options.b: The PIC can disregard the NADP if it is to make the flight more efficient and safe.
options.c: The PIC can choose to use the NADP or not.
options.d: No, the PIC can never disregard the NADP.
